payload.title: Define planning event schema and types
payload.summary: S1: Define planning.* event kinds, payload contracts, and JSON schemas extending git-event-log beyond task lifecycle events.
payload.approach: Extend the Phase 114 canonical event envelope with planning-domain kinds on the same workflow-cannon/task-state stream; add golden fixtures and schema validation without breaking existing task.* admission.
acceptanceCriteria: planning.phase_catalog.upserted, planning.phase_catalog.removed, and planning.workspace_status.updated kinds are documented with instruction capsules.
JSON schemas validate golden fixtures for each planning kind.
Existing task.* event schema and admission tests remain green.
Event kinds use planning.* prefix and share the existing envelope (schemaVersion, sequence, actor, clientMutationId).

blockers: Requires decision to keep planning events on workflow-cannon/task-state (same branch/stream as tasks) rather than a separate git branch.
technicalBreakdown: Add PlanningStateEventKindV1 union with phase_catalog and workspace_status variants.
Define payload types for catalog upsert/remove and workspace status patch (revision, fields).
Add JSON schema files and golden fixtures under task-state-events/fixtures/.
Export planning types from task-state-events index; register schema-only samples if needed.

payload.title: Planning event admission and SQLite applier
payload.summary: S2: Implement admission rules and deterministic applier projecting planning events into kit_phase_catalog and kit_workspace_status.
payload.approach: Mirror task event admission and replay patterns; workspace status uses expectedWorkspaceRevision optimistic concurrency; phase catalog is idempotent on phaseKey and clientMutationId.
acceptanceCriteria: Replay of a fixture stream produces expected kit_phase_catalog rows and kit_workspace_status singleton state.
Workspace revision mismatch rejects admission with a stable error code.
Idempotent replay of the same clientMutationId is a no-op without duplicate audit rows.
kit_workspace_status_events audit trail is populated on workspace status updates when applicable.

blockers: Depends on T100570 schema freeze before implementation starts.
technicalBreakdown: Extend admitTaskStateEventStream to validate planning.* kinds and revision fields.
Implement applyPlanningPhaseCatalogUpsert and applyPlanningPhaseCatalogRemoved.
Implement applyPlanningWorkspaceStatusUpdated with revision bump and conflict detection.
Add unit tests for happy-path replay, revision conflict, and idempotent replay.

payload.title: Canonical publish hooks for catalog and workspace status
payload.summary: S3: Wire phase catalog and workspace status mutators to publish planning events when tasks.canonicalAuthority is git-event-log.
payload.approach: Add finalizeCanonicalPlanning* hooks on upsert-phase-catalog-entry, update-workspace-status, and set-current-phase mirroring the existing task commitCanonical path.
acceptanceCriteria: Mutations under git-event-log authority append planning events and push to workflow-cannon/task-state.
Local SQLite projection updates after successful publish (same transaction semantics as tasks).
Workspaces with sqlite-only canonical authority behave unchanged (no publish attempted).
Publish conflicts surface task-state-stale-version or planning-equivalent stable codes.

blockers: Requires network push access to workflow-cannon/task-state on maintainer machines.
Depends on T100571 applier so local projection can be validated before push.
technicalBreakdown: Add draftPlanningPhaseCatalogEvent and draftPlanningWorkspaceStatusEvent helpers.
Hook upsert-phase-catalog-entry post-save to commitCanonicalPlanningEvents.
Hook update-workspace-status and set-current-phase to publish workspace status events.
Add integration test with mock git publish verifying event payload shape.

payload.title: Extend hydrate for planning projection
payload.summary: S4: Extend task-state-hydrate to replay planning events and report planning projection sync state.
payload.approach: Single hydrate pass replays the full canonical stream (task + planning); extend projection meta to track planning applied sequence alongside task sequence.
acceptanceCriteria: task-state-hydrate with fetch:true applies planning events to kit_phase_catalog and kit_workspace_status.
task-state-status JSON includes planning sync state (current, behind, conflict) with reason.
Post-merge/post-rewrite hooks and extension git HEAD listener converge planning state without manual steps.
Mixed task+planning fixture hydrate test passes.

blockers: Depends on T100571 applier; coordinate meta schema bump with KIT_SQLITE_USER_VERSION if new columns required.
technicalBreakdown: Extend replayTailFromSnapshot / event apply loop for planning kinds.
Extend kit_task_state_projection_meta (or add planning columns) for applied planning sequence.
Update task-state-status-runtime to compare local vs remote planning tail.
Add hydrate golden test with catalog + workspace status events in stream.

payload.title: planning-state-migrate-baseline command
payload.summary: S5: One-time baseline command seeding genesis planning events from local SQLite (phase catalog + workspace status).
payload.approach: Read kit_phase_catalog and kit_workspace_status from the unified DB, emit genesis planning events on the canonical branch; support dryRun and overwriteExisting like task-state-migrate-baseline.
acceptanceCriteria: Dry-run reports row counts and content digest without mutating git.
Apply publishes genesis planning events when branch lacks planning tail or overwriteExisting is true.
Operator runbook documents one-time seed ritual on the machine with the most complete catalog.
Command registered with --schema-only capsule and appears in run --list-commands.

blockers: Should run on the laptop with the fullest phase roster before other machines hydrate.
Depends on hydrate path (T100573) to verify round-trip after baseline.
technicalBreakdown: Implement runPlanningStateMigrateBaseline reading catalog + workspace status rows.
Wire publish via existing task-state git layout (same segments/manifest).
Register command + instruction capsule + contract schema entry.
Document seed ritual in .ai/runbooks/task-state-git-operator.md.

payload.title: Status, doctor, and operator docs (Phase 119)
payload.summary: S6: Expose planning projection health in doctor/status and update operator runbooks for Phase 119 scope.
payload.approach: Doctor warns when local planning projection is behind or conflicted with canonical git; update machine runbooks and persistence map notes for planning sync domains.
acceptanceCriteria: doctor surfaces planning behind/conflict alongside existing task-state drift checks.
task-state-git-operator runbook lists Phase 119 synced domains (catalog + workspace status).
get-kit-persistence-map data notes planning canonical sync when git-event-log is enabled.
install-git-hooks instruction mentions planning hydrate scope (inherits task-state-hydrate).

blockers: Depends on task-state-status planning fields from T100573.
technicalBreakdown: Add doctor issue codes/messages for planning projection drift.
Extend task-state-sync-status helpers for planning sequence comparison.
Update .ai/runbooks/task-state-git-operator.md and install-git-hooks.md.
Add planning sync note to get-kit-persistence-map response.

payload.title: Phase 119 integration validation
payload.summary: S7: End-to-end validation that two laptops converge on phase catalog and workspace status after pull and hydrate.
payload.approach: Automated tests plus a documented two-machine checklist; verify post-merge hooks and extension git HEAD listener without regressing task-only git-event-log flows.
acceptanceCriteria: Root unit tests and extension tests pass.
Manual checklist documented: machine A publishes catalog edit; machine B git pull + hydrate matches roster and workspace status.
No regression in existing task publish/hydrate/conflict scenarios.
Evidence attached in task notes (test output summary or run URLs).

blockers: Requires two-machine manual check or two-worktree simulation for final acceptance.
Blocked until publish, hydrate, baseline, and docs tasks complete.
technicalBreakdown: Add integration tests for planning publisher + applier round-trip.
Add hydrate golden test with mixed task and planning stream.
Document two-laptop checklist in task completion notes.
Run pnpm test and extension test suite; fix any drift.

payload.title: Phase journal planning events
payload.summary: S1: Sync phase_notes, phase_note_refs, and phase_note_task_suggestions via planning.phase_note.* events.
payload.approach: Add planning.phase_note.created, updated, and archived event kinds with publish hooks on phase journal mutators and applier targeting phase_notes tables.
technicalScope: phase journal command runtime (create/update/archive phase notes)
acceptanceCriteria: Phase note create/update/archive mutations publish planning events under git-event-log authority.
Hydrate replays phase notes and refs identically on a fresh projection.
Idempotency keys on phase note commands prevent duplicate rows on replay.
Phase 119 task+planning hydrate tests remain green.

blockers: Phase 120 work starts after Phase 119 integration validation (T100576) completes.
technicalBreakdown: Define planning.phase_note.* payload schemas and fixtures.
Implement applier writing phase_notes, phase_note_refs, phase_note_task_suggestions.
Wire publish hooks on phase journal mutation commands.
Add unit and hydrate tests for phase note event streams.

payload.title: Workflow ideas planning events
payload.summary: S2: Sync workflow_ideas rows via planning.idea.created and planning.idea.updated events.
payload.approach: Extend planning event schema and applier for the ideas module; publish on idea create/update commands when git-event-log authority is active.
acceptanceCriteria: Idea create and update commands publish planning.idea.* events under git-event-log.
Hydrate restores workflow_ideas rows on a second machine.
Ideas module tests cover event draft, publish, and replay.
No duplicate ideas on idempotent command replay.

blockers: Depends on Phase 119 foundation (T100576) and ideas module command surfaces from Phase 116.
technicalBreakdown: Add planning.idea.created and planning.idea.updated payload types and schemas.
Implement applier for workflow_ideas insert/update.
Hook ideas module mutators to canonical publish path.
Add ideas + hydrate integration tests.

payload.title: Module state planning events
payload.summary: S3: Sync workspace_module_state for improvement, agent-behavior, and planning-build-session via planning.module_state.updated events.
payload.approach: Allowlist module IDs that represent cross-machine operator state; publish on module state save; applier upserts workspace_module_state rows with schema version checks.
technicalScope: improvement, agent-behavior, planning-build-session module save hooks
acceptanceCriteria: Only allowlisted module IDs (improvement, agent-behavior, planning-build-session) publish planning events.
Hydrate restores module state JSON on a second machine for allowlisted modules.
Non-allowlisted module saves do not publish planning events.
state_schema_version mismatch rejects admission with stable error code.

blockers: Requires inventory of all module state write paths to avoid missing publish hooks.
technicalBreakdown: Define planning.module_state.updated payload (moduleId, state_schema_version, state_json).
Implement applier upserting workspace_module_state.
Add publish hooks on allowlisted module persistence saves.
Add tests per module id for publish + replay round-trip.

payload.title: planning.canonicalSync.domains config flag
payload.summary: S4: Add planning.canonicalSync.domains config to toggle which planning domains publish and hydrate under git-event-log.
payload.approach: Register config key with defaults covering Phase 119+120 domains; gate publish hooks and hydrate applier by domain list; document in CONFIG.md.
acceptanceCriteria: Config key planning.canonicalSync.domains accepts array of domain ids (tasks, phaseCatalog, workspaceStatus, phaseNotes, ideas, moduleState).
Default includes all Phase 119 and 120 domains when git-event-log authority is enabled.
Disabling a domain skips publish and hydrate apply for that domain only.
doctor or explain-config surfaces effective domain list.

blockers: Config registry change may need maintainer review per policy.
Implement after core domains land so toggle is meaningful.
technicalBreakdown: Add planning.canonicalSync.domains to config registry and workspace-kit-config defaults.
Implement readPlanningSyncDomains helper used by publish and hydrate.
Gate each domain applier and publish hook by domain membership.
Document in .ai/CONFIG.md and add config validation test.

payload.title: Phase 120 integration validation
payload.summary: S5: End-to-end validation for Phase 120 domains (phase journal, ideas, module state) across two machines.
payload.approach: Extend Phase 119 checklist; automated tests for each new domain; verify domain config toggle disables sync as expected.
acceptanceCriteria: All automated test gates pass with Phase 120 domains enabled.
Two-machine checklist covers phase note, idea, and module state convergence after hydrate.
Disabling a domain via planning.canonicalSync.domains prevents publish and hydrate for that domain.
Phase 119 scenarios remain green with expanded stream.

blockers: Requires two-machine manual verification or dual-worktree simulation.
technicalBreakdown: Add cross-domain hydrate golden fixture test.
Extend operator runbook with Phase 120 synced tables list.
Run full test suite and attach evidence to task notes.
Execute two-laptop manual checklist and record results.
